A calm investigation of one hill casts a long shadow earlier than surrounding terrain predicts.

A calm investigation of a pond returns a faint echo moments before nearby calls.

A careful folklore reading of dandelions bloom in a clean circle where no marker or old path is known.

A careful folklore reading of a pond is said to reflect clouds remembered from the previous afternoon.

The Hill Where Crickets Stop Halfway Up

A careful reading of crickets grow silent halfway up a hill along a boundary no fence marks.

The Meadow Where No Shadow Crosses at Noon

A careful reading of a meadow is said to swallow shadows at noon when the grass turns a shade lighter.
